data.text: M06/P08 FELISIAN. AT 28.78 UNDER A GLOOMY SKY, THERE WERE MANY
SMALL PONDS ON BROWNISH GROUND BWITH VARIOUS SMALL PLANT LIFE.
307.23 WAS SPARSELY GRASSY WITH A SLIGHT IMCLINE AND MANY SMALL
PLANTS. 11.116 WAS COLD, BARREN, SLIGHTLY ROLLING GROUND WITH A
SMALL LAKE; A HOPPER WAS FROLICING IN THE DIM SUNSHINE. 103.96 WHILE
LANDING SIGHTED WHAT APPEARED TO BE A LARGE AND A SMALL HOPPERS; BUT
AFTER LANDING ON THE VERY HILLY GROUND WITH SHRUBS AND SOME KIND
OF TREES, ONLY ONE HOPPER WAS FOUND. PRO 0.245.880 PRV 0.002.712.768
